'''WEG-1618'''<ref name="WEG-1618" /> was a [[Color/Legends|copper]]-plated [[Droid/Legends|droid]]<ref name="Star Tours" /> with yellow [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]].<ref name="WEG-1618" /> It had the number "1618" printed on either side of its torso, along with a warning label reading "IRRITANT" in [[High Galactic/Legends|High Galactic]].<ref name="Star Tours" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4.3 ABY]],<ref name="KOTHB">{{Blog|holocron|7|Death Star timeline}}</ref> WEG-1618 worked aboard the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency's [[Tomorrowland Starport]], where it could be found repairing an elevator, in addition to an [[R5-series astromech droid|R5 unit]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Behind the scenes==
WEG-1618 was created for the [[1987]] [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] [[Wikipedia:Simulator ride|simulator ride]] [[Wikipedia:Amusement park|theme park]] attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], where it was featured in the ride's queue at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]] and [[Disneyland Paris]]. Although 1618 was printed on either side of its torso,<ref name="Star Tours" /> it was without a proper designation until an action figure of the droid designating it WEG-1618 was released in [[2003]] as part of the [[Wikipedia:Walt Disney Parks and Resorts|Disney Parks]] exclusive [[Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|''Star Wars: Star Tours'']] toy line.<ref name="WEG-1618" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] {{1st}} {{C|Orlando and Paris only}}
